task_completion.description: Create and name at least 5 functional zones: Adult Reading Area, Children's Area, Reference Stacks, Circulation Desk, and Staff Workroom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D floor plan for room names or text labels explicitly identifying the 5 required zones.

task_completion.description: Apply distinct floor colors or textures to visually differentiate at least 3 of the zones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D floor plan or the 3D view pane. At least 3 of the defined rooms/zones should have clearly different floor colors or patterns.

task_completion.description: Furnish the library with at least 10 shelving units (bookcases/shelves) for the Reference Stacks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the shelving units/bookcases visible in the 2D plan, 3D view, or the furniture list panel. There must be at least 10.

task_completion.description: Furnish the reading/study areas with at least 6 tables and 12 chairs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the tables and chairs in the 2D plan, 3D view, or furniture list panel. There must be at least 6 tables and 12 chairs.

task_completion.description: Add at least 2 desks, 4 lamps, 3 plants/decor items, and 3 wayfinding text labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify the presence of >= 2 desks, >= 4 lamps, and >= 3 plants/decor items in the 3D view or furniture list. Also, look for >= 3 text labels placed on the 2D floor plan for wayfinding.

task_completion.description: Ensure the total number of furniture items placed in the design is at least 40.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the furniture list panel on the left side of the Sweet Home 3D interface. The list should be populated with at least 40 total items.
Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/library_design.sh3d, or check if the main Sweet Home 3D window title has updated to 'library_design.sh3d'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to design the library.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application open with items being dragged from the catalog, room creation tools being used, and dialog boxes for modifying text/colors.

integrity.description: The agent used the built-in catalog for furniture rather than bypassing the requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: Furniture items in the list and 3D view should correspond to standard Sweet Home 3D catalog items (e.g., standard icons in the furniture list panel).

integrity.description: The agent saved the file through the application rather than using terminal commands to create a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog box in Sweet Home 3D or the window title changing, rather than a terminal window using 'touch library_design.sh3d'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected zones: 5 (Adult Reading Area, Children's Area, Reference Stacks, Circulation Desk, Staff Workroom). Expected minimums: 10 shelving units, 6 tables, 12 chairs, 2 desks, 4 lamps, 3 plants/decor items, 3 wayfinding labels. Total furniture count must be at least 40 for maximum score. At least 3 zones must have distinct floor colors/textures.
